panels.title: Slowest performance cases

targets.rawSql: SELECT `case`, COUNT(*) AS samples, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_perf_case GROUP BY `case` ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 30

panels.description: High-level test case duration. Start here to see which end-to-end operation is slow.

panels.title: Request latency by route

targets.rawSql: SELECT path, status, COUNT(*) AS requests, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_request GROUP BY path, status ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 30

panels.description: Public/admin request latency after route middleware, grouped by route and status.

targets.rawSql: SELECT greptime_timestamp AS time, CONCAT(path, ' ', status) AS metric, duration_ms FROM anvil_request ORDER BY greptime_timestamp

panels.title: CoreStore operation latency

targets.rawSql: SELECT operation, COUNT(*) AS calls, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_core_store_op GROUP BY operation ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 30

panels.description: Top-level CoreStore operations such as put_blob, append_stream, mutation batches, CAS and fences.

panels.title: Internal spans

targets.rawSql: SELECT span, COUNT(*) AS samples, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_internal_span GROUP BY span ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 50

panels.description: Manually emitted internal spans from release/perf gates and focused code paths.

panels.title: File I/O phases by max latency

targets.rawSql: SELECT component, operation, COUNT(*) AS calls, SUM(bytes) AS bytes, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_file_io GROUP BY component, operation ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 50

panels.description: Disk operations measured at file-operation level, including write_all, sync_all, rename, reads, lock files and temp payload files.
